title: How Innocuous Text Can Lead to a Data Breach
description: This flowchart illustrates the process by which seemingly harmless text can be used to deceive individuals and bypass security controls, leading to a data breach.
elements: Seemingly Innocuous Text (e.g., fake error message, urgent request)
relationships: Attacker crafts and sends text (e.g., via phishing email) -> Text appears legitimate and creates a sense of urgency -> User is deceived into taking action (e.g., clicking link, providing credentials) -> Action bypasses security -> Attacker gains access to internal system -> Attacker locates and exfiltrates sensitive data
